predictions.title: Group stage predictions
predictions.stageLockedHint: Complete the previous stage to unlock
predictions.tiebreakerHelp: Some third-place teams from different groups have identical stats (points, goal difference, goals scored). Since head-to-head cannot apply across groups, you must manually resolve the tie.
predictions.tiebreakerWarning: Not all ties have been resolved yet. This affects which teams appear in the knockout bracket.
predictions.tiebreakerCriteriaTitle: FIFA ranking criteria (third-place teams across groups)
predictions.criterion4: Fair play points (not tracked in this app)
predictions.knockoutLockedByTiebreaker: Resolve all third-place tiebreakers above before entering knockout predictions.
predictions.topScorerHint: Predict who will be the tournament's top goal scorer (20 bonus points)

help.title: Scoring guide
help.scoringDesc: You earn points for each match based on how close your prediction is to the actual result. Only one type of points is awarded per match (the highest applicable).
help.multipliersDesc: Match points are multiplied based on which stage of the tournament the match is in. Later stages are worth more!
help.bonusDesc: Earn bonus points for correctly predicting which teams advance through the tournament. These are calculated from your group stage predictions and knockout picks.
help.formatDesc: The 2026 FIFA World Cup features an expanded 48-team format. Understanding how teams advance is key to maximizing your bonus points.
help.exactDesc: You predicted the exact score (e.g., 2-1 when result is 2-1)
help.resultDesc: Knockout only: You predicted the exact scoreline, but different teams advanced to the match. Same score = 3 points!
help.halfDesc: One of your scores (home or away) matches the actual result (e.g., tip 2-0, actual 2-3)
help.outcomeDesc: Correct winner or draw, but no individual score matches (e.g., 3-0 when result is 2-1)
help.topScorerDesc: You can also predict the tournament's top goal scorer. If you predict the correct player (judged by admin) you earn 20 bonus points.
help.example2Tip: Your tip: Brazil 2–0 Japan (home score 2 matches!)
help.example2Note: Your home score was correct, so you earn half score points!
help.example3Tip: Your tip: Germany 3–0 Argentina (correct winner, no score match)
help.formula: Total = Sum(Match Points × Stage Multiplier) + Bonus Points
help.groupStageDesc: 48 teams are divided into 12 groups of 4 teams each. Every team plays 3 matches (one against each opponent in their group). Teams earn 3 points for a win, 1 for a draw, and 0 for a loss.
help.groupAdvanceDesc: From each group, the top 2 teams (winner and runner-up) advance directly to the Round of 32. That's 24 teams. The remaining 8 spots go to the best third-placed teams across all 12 groups.
help.thirdPlaceDesc: After the group stage, the 12 third-placed teams are ranked against each other. The top 8 advance to the knockout stage. This ranking uses FIFA's official criteria:
help.thirdPlaceNote: Your group stage predictions automatically calculate which third-placed teams advance based on simulated standings. Getting the right 8 third-placed teams earns you bonus points!
help.knockoutDesc: 32 teams compete in single-elimination matches: Round of 32 → Round of 16 → Quarter-finals → Semi-finals → Third Place Match → Final. If a knockout match is tied after 90 minutes, you predict the penalty shootout winner.
